  • Overview

  • Index
  • Help
SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Authentication
Provides base authentication utilities for the application.
EasyInformations
Represents an easy-level information object in the game.
EasyQuestions
Represents an easy-level question box that appears in the game.
Game
Handles the main game logic and player interactions.
GameGUI
GameGUI is a JPanel responsible for displaying and controlling the game interface.
HardInformations
Represents a hard-level information box in the game.
HardQuestions
Represents a hard-level question box that appears in the game.
Home
Manages the current player instance and controls transitions between different game levels.
HomeGUI
Displays the current user's image and username, and provides buttons to start the game, view the scoreboard, or logout.
Informations
The Informations abstract class represents info boxes.
InvalidAuthException
Custom runtime exception thrown when an authentication attempt is invalid.
KnowledgeKeepers
Abstract class representing Knowledge Keepers in the game, such as SLs, TAs, and Professors.
Level1
Represents the first level of the game.
Level2
Represents the second level of the game.
Level3
Represents the third level of the game.
Login
Verifies the username and password with stored data in users.txt.
LoginGUI
The login panel for the application.
Main
The Main class is the entry point of the application.
MainGUI
The main frame of the application that handles screen navigation using CardLayout.
MidInformations
Represents a medium-level information box in the game.
MidQuestions
Represents a medium-level question box in the game.
Player
This class is responsible to manage player’s credentials
Professor
Represents a Professor entity in the game, extending KnowledgeKeepers.
Questions
The Questions abstract class represents question objects that fall during gameplay, and can be interacted with by the player to loss health as penalty.
Register
Saves user credentials, stores a profile image, and prepares the user's directory structure.
RegisterGUI
Register screen panel for new user sign-up.
ShotBoxes
The ShotBoxes interface defines the structure for shotbox objects in the game that represent either questions or informational items.
SL
Represents a Section Leader (SL) entity in the game, extending KnowledgeKeepers.
TA
Represents a Teaching Assistant (TA) entity in the game, extending KnowledgeKeepers.
